title: Copilot stuck at activating
author: Leo
text:
I am currently connected to my school server through SSH and school VPN.
I am using VS Code with the following details:
Version: 1.78.1 (user setup)
Commit: 6a995c4f4cc2ced6e3237749973982e751cb0bf9
Date: 2023-05-04T09:48:08.683Z
Electron: 22.5.1
Chromium: 108.0.5359.215
Node.js: 16.17.1
V8: 10.8.168.25-electron.0
OS: Windows_NT x64 10.0.22621
Sandboxed: No
I have tried to install GitHub Copilot (locally) and GitHub Copilot Nightly (On SSH) respectively. But none of them worked, it shows that they are undergoing 'activating' forever.
Copilot works fine if I use a local workspace but it is working when I SSH connect to a server.
The output log is empty for Github Copilot.
How can I troubleshoot this?
